title: Lavish Roman villa discovered outside Rome's walls may have been frequented by Hadrian and Marcus Aurelius
summary: The villa, which came to light because it was illegally excavated, was found in an area frequented two millennia ago by the emperors Hadrian, Antoninus Pius and Marcus Aurelius.

title: TCL A65K Soundbar Review: Small Size, Big Sound
summary: Don’t be fooled by the compact size of this soundbar. It’s a solid option for smaller TVs or spaces without having to sacrifice sound quality.

title: 'Melted in a pot somewhere': Vikings used Islamic silver coins to make their early pennies, study finds
summary: The silver in a Viking Age hoard found in Denmark was from melted-down coins from the faraway Islamic world, a new study finds.

title: 'I never thought we'd see one alive': Elusive goblin shark captured on camera for the first time
summary: Researchers have filmed goblin sharks in the deep sea for the first time. Until now, these sharks had been seen alive only after being hauled up to the surface with fishing lines.

title: 'They are trying to tame nature': China is building the world's biggest dam in an earthquake-prone region of Tibet
summary: China is building a dam system that will generate more hydroelectric power than the U.S. generates yearly. But the project comes with huge risks for people downstream.

title: An ancient piece of the moon found in Africa hints at a long-ago collision that turned the lunar surface molten
summary: A meteorite shows evidence that an ancient crash on the moon 3.5 billion years ago was so powerful, it turned the surface molten.

title: تفكيك مصنع للأكياس البلاستكية ببرشيد
summary: تمكنت السلطة المحلية بقيادة أولاد زيان (اقليم برشيد)، بتنسيق مع المركز الترابي للدرك الملكي بالدروة، أخيرا، من حجز كميات مهمة من الأكياس البلاستيكية داخل وحدة صناعية عشوائية بدوار أولاد العباس . ووفق معطيات حصلت عليها “الصباح”، فان السلطة المحلية بقيادة أولاد زيان (اقليم برشيد) توصلت بمعلومات تهمأك…
body: تمكنت السلطة المحلية بقيادة أولاد زيان (اقليم برشيد)، بتنسيق مع المركز الترابي للدرك الملكي بالدروة، أخيرا، من حجز كميات مهمة من الأكياس البلاستيكية داخل وحدة صناعية عشوائية بدوار أولاد العباس . ووفق معطيات حصلت عليها “الصباح”، فان السلطة المحلية بقيادة أولاد زيان (اقليم برشيد) توصلت بمعلومات تهم أكمل القراءة » المقالة تفكيك مصنع للأكياس البلاستكية ببرشيد fمنشورة على جريدة الصباح .

title: Has all the water on Earth been peed before?
summary: Water, water, everywhere … has all of it been peed out at least once?

title: كشف آخر تطورات جهود انتشال جثمان المتسلق اليمني "القعقاع"
summary: أعلن الدفاع المدني اليمني مستجدات جهوده في البحث عن جثمان المتسلق عنتر العبسي الملقب بـ"القعقاع" الذي سقط في حرضة دمت البركانية بمحافظة الضالع جنوبي اليمن.

title: 'I was really amazed': On the edge of the Milky Way, a dwarf galaxy is being ripped in half by its big sibling
summary: A new study shows that the Small Magellanic Cloud is being pulled apart by its larger sibling on the Milky Way's periphery, upending our understanding of our cosmic neighbor.

title: Real-Life Disclosure Day Will Look Nothing Like Steven Spielberg’s New Movie
summary: Previous landmark scientific discoveries like the Higgs boson provide a better template for what it will take to confirm whether aliens have made contact with Earth.

title: Earth's underground fungal network is so massive, it would span 10% of the Milky Way, map reveals
summary: The first global map of subterranean fungi networks reveals how massive its reach is worldwide.

title: The Milky Way returns: How to take breathtaking photos of our galaxy this summer
summary: Learn how to photograph the Milky Way in June with expert astrophotography tips on dark skies, camera settings, timing and composition.

title: This 'crawling' robot rolled around the moon and took a historic photo
summary: A morphable moon robot operated for 100 minutes in 2024, allowing investigators to get images of an upside-down spacecraft on the lunar surface.

title: 'Geminid Symphony' and 'Galactic Gandalf': See the breathtaking views of our home galaxy from the 2026 Milky Way Photographer of the Year contest
summary: Stunning views of the night sky abound in photographs worldwide submitted to this year's Milky Way Photographer of the Year contest.

title: Scientists discover giant, fan-shaped structure deep beneath the East Antarctic Ice Sheet
summary: A mysterious geological structure that resembles a human hand with outstretched fingers has been revealed beneath East Antarctica. The discovery shows the frozen continent still hides many geological secrets.

title: فيديو.. القبض على دب أرعب مدينة يابانية وأغلق المدارس
summary: ألقت السلطات اليابانية القبض على دب بعد عملية بحث استمرت عدة أيام وتسببت في إغلاق نحو 100 مدرسة.

title: Artemis III crew revealed: NASA announces astronauts for 'one of history's most complex missions'
summary: NASA's Artemis III crew has been revealed. The astronauts will launch into low Earth orbit next year to test docking with commercial lunar landers being developed by SpaceX and Blue Origin.

title: Ditch full of 7,000-year-old headless human skeletons discovered in Slovakia, baffling archaeologists
summary: Archaeologists are unsure why people in Stone Age Slovakia removed corpses' heads before burying them in a neighborhood ditch.

title: Trio of drastically different US lakes straddles the border between states — Earth from space
summary: A 2020 astronaut photo shows three uniquely colored lakes — Tahoe, Walker and Mono — straddling contrasting biomes on either side of the California-Nevada border.

title: Physicist Richard Feynman's forgotten notes on 'the restaurant problem' finally deciphered after 50 years
summary: Researchers cracked a 50-year-old math problem scribbled by Richard Feynman over lunch. The equations show that humans are better decision-makers than scientists once thought.

title: Thanks to natural selection, Indigenous Andeans may digest potatoes better than anyone else in the world, study finds
summary: After domesticating potatoes 10,000 years ago, the ancient people of the Andes evolved to have more copies of a key gene involved in digesting starch.

title: من واشنطن إلى أوتاوا.. الأميركيون يبحثون عن جواز بديل
summary: رغم التوتر الذي شاب العلاقات ​الأميركية الكندية في عهد الرئيس الأميركي دونالد ترامب، تشير بيانات موافقات الحصول ​على الجنسية الكندية ضمن مجموعة ⁠واسعة من القواعد الحديثة إلى أن عددا متزايدا من الأميركيين يرحبون بفكرة الحصول على الجنسية الكندية.
